headline: Oil Prices Plummet 4% Amid Global Demand Slump

article.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22

headline: Subprime Auto Dealer's 90% Stock Plunge Amid Defaults

article.title: Subprime Auto Dealer Goes From Covid-Era Star to Near Demise
article.summary: America’s Car-Mart Inc. thrived during a ’90s slump, the 2008 financial crisis and the upheaval of Covid-19 by doing one thing well: selling and financing older, high-mileage used cars for cash-strapped, deeply-subprime buyers.

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
